expectations.evidence: report.html exists and contains a complete 299-line HTML document with DOCTYPE, head, body, and structured content.
report.csv exists and contains 70 data rows (header + 69 item rows) with columns: 영역, 코드, 항목명, 결과, 판정방식, 발견된 문제, 수정 가이드.

expectations.text: Report contains accessibility section (Section A / 접근성)
expectations.evidence: HTML report contains 'A. 접근성 (KWCAG2.2 33항목 + 시맨틱 HTML 7항목)' section header. CSV contains rows with 영역='접근성'.

expectations.text: Report contains SEO & Web Performance section (Section B)
expectations.evidence: HTML report contains 'B. SEO & Web Performance (Technical SEO 11항목 + Page Experience 18항목)' section header. CSV contains rows with 영역='SEO' and 영역='Web Performance'.

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
expectations.evidence: Items numbered 1 through 33 are all present in the HTML table under Section A. CSV rows A-01 through A-33 are all present. Each has a result (pass/fail/partial/NA/unknown) — none are blank or skipped.

expectations.text: All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: HTML and CSV both contain SEO-01 through SEO-11, all with results: SEO-01(pass), SEO-02(partial), SEO-03(pass), SEO-04(pass), SEO-05(fail), SEO-06(fail), SEO-07(fail), SEO-08(pass), SEO-09(pass), SEO-10(pass), SEO-11(pass).

expectations.text: All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: HTML and CSV both contain WP-01 through WP-18, all with results. No items are missing from the sequence.

expectations.text: Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references
expectations.evidence: Failed items include file:line references, e.g., A-01: 'index.html:30', A-10: 'Card.tsx:29', A-17: 'index.html', A-32: 'Card.tsx:27', SEO-05: 'index.html', WP-01: 'index.html:37-44', WP-02: 'index.html:27', WP-10: 'index.html:13-17'. Each includes specific issue descriptions with code snippets.

expectations.text: Fix guide section exists with concrete code-level recommendations
expectations.evidence: HTML report has a '수정 가이드' section with 14 fix items, each containing concrete code examples in <pre> blocks (e.g., adding alt attributes, converting div to button, adding skip-nav links, meta description, canonical URL, font-display: swap, etc.).
HTML lang='ko'. All content is in Korean: title '웹 품질 종합 감사 리포트', section headers '접근성', item names like '적절한 대체 텍스트 제공', fix guides in Korean. CSV headers and content also in Korean.

expectations.text: Only index.html and Card.tsx are reviewed (no dashboard.tsx)
expectations.evidence: Report meta line states '검토 파일: index.html, Card.tsx'. All issue references cite only index.html or Card.tsx. No mention of dashboard.tsx anywhere in either report file.
